title: B002: Kubernetes-Interacting Packages
description:
**Size:** 🏗️ large
**Category:** backend
**Priority:** high
**Feature ID:** CC-0005 (S005)

## Summary

Implement 5 new packages (`secrets/`, `database/`, `deployment/`, `job/`, `tls/`) and extend 2 existing packages (`config/`, `policy/`) in `internal/common/` with Kubernetes API interaction functions (CC-0005). These packages provide reusable create-or-update helpers with owner references, readiness checks, and idempotent behavior — consumed by all service reconcilers starting with Keystone (CC-0013/CC-0014). External CRDs (MariaDB, ESO, cert-manager) use typed Go client imports. Existing `testutil/simulators/` will be migrated from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed clients as part of this feature. All packages require envtest integration tests verifying actual object creation and status handling.

## Scope

**Included:**
- Add typed Go module dependencies: `mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator`, `external-secrets/external-secrets`, `cert-manager/cert-manager` to `internal/common/go.mod`
- Extend `testutil/envtest.SharedScheme()` to register external operator types (MariaDB, ESO, cert-manager) alongside existing core/apps/batch groups
- Migrate existing `testutil/simulators/` functions (`SimulateMariaDBReady`, `SimulateExternalSecretSync`) from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed structs; update their integration tests; retain `setUnstructuredReadyStatus` helper and `SimulateMemcachedReady` as-is (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope)
- Add new typed simulator functions for `Database`, `User`, `Grant`, `PushSecret`, `Certificate` CRD status transitions needed by CC-0005 integration tests
- `config/CreateImmutableConfigMap` — content-hash suffix naming (SHA256), `immutable: true`, owner references via `controllerutil.SetOwnerReference`
- `secrets/WaitForExternalSecret` — check ESO `ExternalSecret` status for `SecretSynced=True` (typed import)
- `secrets/IsSecretReady` — verify Secret exists and contains all `expectedKeys` in `.data` (variadic)
- `secrets/GetSecretValue` — read and decode a specific key from Secret `.data`
- `secrets/EnsurePushSecret` — create-or-update `PushSecret` CR (typed import) with owner reference
- `database/EnsureDatabase` — create or verify MariaDB `Database` CR (typed import), check status readiness
- `database/EnsureDatabaseUser` — create or verify MariaDB `User` + `Grant` CRs with owner references
- `database/RunDBSyncJob` — build and run a K8s Job for `db_sync`, delegates to `job.RunJob`
- `deployment/EnsureDeployment` — accepts full `*appsv1.Deployment`, sets owner reference, create-or-update, returns readiness
- `deployment/EnsureService` — accepts full `*corev1.Service`, sets owner reference, create-or-update
- `deployment/IsDeploymentReady` — pure function: `availableReplicas >= *spec.replicas`
- `job/RunJob` — create Job idempotently (skip if complete), return `(true, nil)` when `succeeded >= 1`
- `job/EnsureCronJob` — create-or-update CronJob with owner reference
- `job/IsJobComplete` — pure function: `succeeded >= 1`
- `tls/EnsureCertificate` — create-or-update cert-manager `Certificate` CR (typed import) with owner reference
- `tls/GetTLSSecret` — retrieve TLS Secret containing `tls.crt`, `tls.key`
- `policy/LoadPolicyFromConfigMap` — read ConfigMap, parse `policy.yaml` key into `map[string]string`
- `doc.go` with `Feature: CC-0005` tag for each new package
- envtest integration tests (`//go:build integration`) for every package using existing `testutil/envtest.SetupEnvTest`
- Unit tests (table-driven, gomega matchers) for pure functions (`IsDeploymentReady`, `IsJobComplete`)

**Excluded:**
- Managed vs brownfield mode branching logic (reconciler responsibility, not shared library — YAGNI)
- Connection string assembly (already in `config.InjectSecrets` from CC-0004)
- Reconciler sub-reconciler implementations (CC-0013/CC-0014)
- CRD type definitions and webhooks (CC-0011/CC-0012)
- New testutil builders beyond what CC-0002 provides (new typed simulators for CC-0005 CRDs are in-scope; new fluent builders are not)
- Migration of `SimulateMemcachedReady` to typed (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope — remains unstructured)
- Helm chart packaging, RBAC markers, controller registration (later phases)
- RabbitMQ or Memcached interaction packages (not in CC-0005 scope)
- Architecture doc update for the unstructured→typed decision (tracked separately)

## Visualization

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph existing["Existing Packages - CC-0004"]
        types["types/"]
        conditions["conditions/"]
        configPure["config/ pure funcs"]
        policyPure["policy/ pure funcs"]
    end

    subgraph testInfra["Test Infrastructure - CC-0002 + migration"]
        envtest["testutil/envtest/ + SharedScheme ext"]
        simulators["testutil/simulators/ - migrated to typed"]
        builders["testutil/builders/"]
        fakeCRDs["testutil/fake_crds/"]
    end

    subgraph new["New/Extended Packages - CC-0005"]
        configK8s["config/ + CreateImmutableConfigMap"]
        policyK8s["policy/ + LoadPolicyFromConfigMap"]
        secretsPkg["secrets/"]
        databasePkg["database/"]
        deploymentPkg["deployment/"]
        jobPkg["job/"]
        tlsPkg["tls/"]
    end

    subgraph k8sAPI["Core Kubernetes Resources"]
        CM["ConfigMap"]
        Secret["Secret"]
        Dep["Deployment"]
        Svc["Service"]
        Job["Job"]
        CronJob["CronJob"]
    end

    subgraph extCRDs["External Operator CRDs - typed imports"]
        MariaDB["MariaDB Database/User/Grant"]
        ESO["ExternalSecret/PushSecret"]
        CertMgr["cert-manager Certificate"]
    end

    configK8s --> CM
    policyK8s --> CM
    secretsPkg --> Secret
    secretsPkg --> ESO
    databasePkg --> MariaDB
    databasePkg --> jobPkg
    deploymentPkg --> Dep
    deploymentPkg --> Svc
    jobPkg --> Job
    jobPkg --> CronJob
    tlsPkg --> CertMgr
    tlsPkg --> Secret

    configK8s -.->|uses| configPure
    policyK8s -.->|uses| policyPure
    databasePkg -.->|uses| types
    secretsPkg -.->|uses| types
    simulators -.->|typed structs| extCRDs
    envtest -.->|registers| extCRDs
```

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant R as Reconciler
    participant S as secrets/
    participant DB as database/
    participant J as job/
    participant C as config/
    participant D as deployment/
    participant K8s as Kubernetes API

    R->>S: WaitForExternalSecret
    S->>K8s: Get ExternalSecret CR
    K8s-->>S: status.conditions
    S-->>R: ready=true

    R->>DB: EnsureDatabase
    DB->>K8s: Create/Update MariaDB Database CR
    K8s-->>DB: status ready
    DB-->>R: ready=true

    R->>DB: RunDBSyncJob
    DB->>J: RunJob internally
    J->>K8s: Create Job
    K8s-->>J: status.succeeded=1
    J-->>DB: complete=true
    DB-->>R: synced=true

    R->>C: CreateImmutableConfigMap
    C->>K8s: Create ConfigMap with hash suffix
    K8s-->>C: created
    C-->>R: configMapName

    R->>D: EnsureDeployment
    D->>K8s: Create/Update Deployment
    K8s-->>D: availableReplicas
    D-->>R: ready=true
```

## Key Components

- **Typed Go module imports**: Add `mariadb-operator/mariadb-operator`, `external-secrets/external-secrets`, `cert-manager/cert-manager` as dependencies in `internal/common/go.mod`. Used by production packages and migrated simulators.
- **SharedScheme extension**: Extend `testutil/envtest.SharedScheme()` to register external operator types (MariaDB `Database`/`User`/`Grant`, ESO `ExternalSecret`/`PushSecret`, cert-manager `Certificate`) so envtest's controller-runtime client can work with typed objects. The existing `fake_crds/` CRD YAML schemas remain unchanged — they define the API server schema; the scheme registration adds Go type awareness.
- **Simulator migration**: Refactor `testutil/simulators/SimulateMariaDBReady` and `SimulateExternalSecretSync` from `unstructured.Unstructured` to typed structs. Retain `setUnstructuredReadyStatus` helper and `SimulateMemcachedReady` as-is (Memcached not in CC-0005 scope). Add new typed simulators: `SimulateDatabaseReady`, `SimulateUserReady`, `SimulateGrantReady`, `SimulatePushSecretSynced`, `SimulateCertificateReady` for CC-0005 integration tests.
- **`config/CreateImmutableConfigMap`**: Creates immutable ConfigMap with SHA256 content-hash suffix (e.g., `keystone-config-a1b2c3d4`), sets owner reference, sets `immutable: true`. Returns `(*corev1.ConfigMap, error)`. Hash change triggers new ConfigMap → Deployment rolling restart via changed volume reference.
- **`secrets/WaitForExternalSecret`**: Gets ESO `ExternalSecret` CR (typed), checks status conditions for `SecretSynced=True`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`secrets/IsSecretReady`**: Gets K8s Secret, verifies existence and that all `expectedKeys` are present in `.data`. Signature: `IsSecretReady(ctx, client, namespace, name string, expectedKeys ...string) (bool, error)`.
- **`secrets/GetSecretValue`**: Reads specific key from Secret `.data`, returns decoded string. Returns `(string, error)`.
- **`secrets/EnsurePushSecret`**: Creates or updates ESO `PushSecret` CR (typed) with owner reference. Idempotent via `controllerutil.CreateOrUpdate`.
- **`database/EnsureDatabase`**: Creates or verifies MariaDB `Database` CR (typed), checks status for readiness. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`database/EnsureDatabaseUser`**: Creates or verifies MariaDB `User` CR + `Grant` CR in a single call. Both get owner references. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`database/RunDBSyncJob`**: Builds Job from image spec, command, and env vars for `db_sync`. Delegates to `job.RunJob`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`deployment/EnsureDeployment`**: Accepts full `*appsv1.Deployment`. Sets owner reference, applies create-or-update, returns readiness based on `availableReplicas >= *spec.replicas`. Returns `(bool, error)`.
- **`deployment/EnsureService`**: Accepts full `*corev1.Service`. Sets owner reference, applies create-or-update. Returns `error`.
- **`deployment/IsDeploymentReady`**: Pure function, no API call. Checks `deployment.Status.AvailableReplicas >= *deployment.Spec.Replicas`.
- **`job/RunJob`**: Creates Job idempotently (skips if already exists and complete). Returns `(true, nil)` when `succeeded >= 1`, `(false, nil)` when still running.
- **`job/EnsureCronJob`**: Create-or-update for CronJob with owner reference. Returns `error`.
- **`job/IsJobComplete`**: Pure function, no API call. Checks `job.Status.Succeeded >= 1`.
- **`tls/EnsureCertificate`**: Creates or updates cert-manager `Certificate` CR (typed) with owner reference. Returns `error`.
- **`tls/GetTLSSecret`**: Gets TLS Secret by name, returns `(*corev1.Secret, error)`.
- **`policy/LoadPolicyFromConfigMap`**: Gets ConfigMap by namespace/name, extracts `policy.yaml` key, parses YAML into `map[string]string`. Returns error if ConfigMap missing or key absent.
- **envtest integration tests**: One `_integration_test.go` per package with `//go:build integration` tag. Uses `testutil/envtest.SetupEnvTest` (which auto-discovers CRDs from `fake_crds/`), simulators for external CRD status transitions. Tests verify: object creation, owner references, status handling, idempotency (call twice), and not-found error cases. Pure functions (`IsDeploymentReady`, `IsJobComplete`) use standard table-driven unit tests with `NewGomegaWithT(t)` and gomega matchers, consistent with existing CC-0004 test patterns.
